channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SUTLEJTEX] Sutlej Textiles Approves FY26 Audited Results, New Director
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Sutlej Textiles and Industries Ltd's board meeting on May 5, 2026, approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board also appointed Shri Alok Ohrie as an Additional Independent Director for a 5-year term, subject to shareholder approval. Additionally, the company is entering a new line of business in Technical Textiles, focusing on protective textiles.

  • Audited FY26 standalone and consolidated financial results approved.
  • Alok Ohrie appointed as Additional Independent Director for 5 years.
  • Company to enter Technical Textiles business, focusing on protective textiles.
  • Audit report issued with unmodified opinion for FY26 results.
  • Meeting concluded at 1.17 p.m. after commencing at 11.30 a.m.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUTLEJ TEXTILES & INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AGI] Agi Greenpac Announces ₹1,000 Cr Aluminium Can Plant in Hathras
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Agi Greenpac Ltd has commenced construction of a new aluminium beverage can manufacturing facility in Hathras, Uttar Pradesh, with an investment of ₹1,000 crore. The plant, spread across 34 acres, will have an initial capacity of 1.6 billion cans per year, scalable to over 2 billion. Operations are scheduled to begin in the first half of 2027. The facility aims for a Platinum Green Building rating and will manufacture standard, sleek, and slim aluminium beverage cans.

  • Agi Greenpac invests ₹1,000 crore in a new aluminium can plant.
  • The plant will have an initial capacity of 1.6 billion cans per year.
  • The facility is designed for scalability to over 2 billion cans annually.
  • Operations are expected to commence in the first half of 2027.
  • The plant targets a Platinum Green Building rating for sustainability.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Agi Greenpac Ltd | Category: Expansion

item.title: [PNB] PNB Net Profit Surpasses ₹16,900 Crore in FY'26
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Punjab National Bank (PNB) reported a net profit of ₹16,904 Crore for FY'26, a 1.6% year-on-year increase. The net profit for Q4 FY'26 stood at ₹5,225 Crore, up 14.4% year-on-year. The bank's operating profit for FY'26 was ₹29,290 Crore, reflecting a 9.2% year-on-year growth. Asset quality improved, with the GNPA ratio decreasing to 2.95% and the NNPA ratio to 0.29%. Global business grew by 10.7% to ₹29.70 Lakh Crore. The Board also highlighted improvements in key parameters such as deposits, advances, and capital adequacy.

  • Net profit for FY'26 reached ₹16,904 Crore, up 1.6% Y-o-Y.
  • GNPA ratio improved by 100 bps to 2.95% as of March 31, 2026.
  • Global Business grew by 10.7% Y-o-Y to ₹29.70 Lakh Crore.
  • CRAR improved to 17.74% as on March 31, 2026, up by 73 bps.
  • Earnings per share rose to ₹4.55 in Q4 FY’26, a 14.6% Y-o-Y growth.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PUNJAB NATIONAL BANK | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [VOLTAMP] Voltamp Transformers Recommends 1000% Dividend
item.description:
Voltamp Transformers Ltd's board meeting on May 05, 2026, approved the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board recommended a dividend of ₹100 per share (1000% on face value of ₹10 each) for FY26. Additionally, the company approved a fresh investment of ₹25 crores for acquiring land near Vadodara, funded through internal accruals, to expand its land bank for future use. The audit report has an unmodified opinion.

  • Audited financial results for Q4 and FY26 approved.
  • Dividend of ₹100 per share (1000%) recommended for FY26.
  • ₹25 crore investment approved for land acquisition near Vadodara.
  • The auditor's report carries an unmodified opinion.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VOLTAMP TRANSFORMERS LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [SHRGLTR] Lloyds Enterprises Board Meeting on May 8, 2026
item.description:
Lloyds Enterprises Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 8, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider recommending a final dividend, if any, to the shareholders. The trading window has been closed since April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the announcement of the financial results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 8, 2026, to approve financial results.
  • Audited standalone and consolidated results for FY26 will be considered.
  • Final dividend recommendation for FY26 to be discussed.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours post results announcement.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SHREE GLOBAL TRADEFIN LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NBCC] NBCC Bags Orders Worth ₹176.28 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

NBCC (India) Ltd has been awarded new works totaling approximately ₹176.28 Cr. These projects include relaying athletic tracks, renovating football grounds, interior work for APEDA, furniture for Navodaya Vidyalaya, construction for Canara Bank, and additional works at IIM Sambalpur. These orders fall within the company's normal course of business.

  • NBCC secures orders worth ₹176.28 Cr across multiple projects.
  • Projects include sports infrastructure, office interiors, and building construction.
  • Clients include Sports Dept. Odisha, APEDA, Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti, Canara Bank, and IIM Sambalpur.
  • The awarded works are part of NBCC's ordinary business operations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NBCC (India) Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [EXXARO] Exxaro Tiles Reappoints Mitesh Koshti as Internal Auditor
item.description:
Exxaro Tiles Ltd has re-appointed Mr. Mitesh Koshti as its internal auditor for the financial year 2026-27. The decision was made during a Board of Directors meeting held on May 5, 2026, following Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Mr. Koshti, a qualified Master in Commerce with over 10 years of experience, previously worked with Naresh J. Patel & Co. and has expertise in setting up internal audit functions and leveraging data analytics.

  • Mitesh Koshti re-appointed as internal auditor for FY 2026-27.
  • Re-appointment approved at Board meeting on May 5, 2026.
  • Koshti has over 10 years of multi-industry experience.
  • He previously worked with Naresh J. Patel & Co.
  • Koshti is skilled in using data analytics for internal audits.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Exxaro Tiles Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [EXXARO] Exxaro Tiles Approves Audited Financial Results for FY26
item.description:
Exxaro Tiles Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the fourth quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The audit report, issued by the Statutory Auditors, contains an unmodified opinion. The board also approved the re-appointment of Mr. Mitesh Koshti as Internal Auditors for the financial year 2026-27, based on the Audit Committee's recommendation. The meeting commenced at 11:20 A.M. and concluded at 12:45 P.M.

  • Exxaro Tiles approved audited standalone and consolidated financial results for FY26.
  • Statutory Auditors issued an audit report with an unmodified opinion.
  • Mitesh Koshti re-appointed as Internal Auditor for FY27.
  • Audit Committee recommended the re-appointment of the Internal Auditor.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Exxaro Tiles Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [VOLTAMP] Voltamp Transformers: FY26 Audited Results & 1000% Dividend
item.description:
Voltamp Transformers Ltd approved audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board recommended a 1000% dividend, equivalent to ₹100 per share of ₹10 each, for the financial year. Additionally, the company plans a fresh investment of ₹25 crores for land acquisition near Vadodara, funded through internal accruals, to prepare for future expansion.

  • Audited financial results for Q4 and FY26 approved.
  • Dividend of 1000% (₹100 per share) recommended for FY26.
  • ₹25 crore investment planned for land acquisition near Vadodara.
  • Auditor's report carries an unmodified opinion.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VOLTAMP TRANSFORMERS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [ATLASCYCLE] Atlas Cycles Board Meeting on May 14 to Approve Audited Results
item.description:
Atlas Cycles (Haryana) Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 14, 2026, to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results for the quarter/year ended March 31, 2026. This announcement was made to the BSE under Regulation 29 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Atlas Cycles board meeting set for May 14, 2026.
  • Meeting to approve audited financial results.
  • Results are for quarter/year ending March 31, 2026.
  • Announcement made under SEBI Listing Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ATLAS CYCLES (HARYANA) LTD. | Category: Board Meeting
